purpose: Detect a completed MMG Knowledge Subscription order on Shopify's Thank you page and route the buyer into the governed first two-title workflow without placing title selection inside checkout.

endpoint_contract.customer_identity_source: verified Shopify order and signed session-token claims only

subscription_detection.trusted_data_source: Shopify order loaded by the server-side order gateway
required_predicates: The line matches the canonical MMG Knowledge Subscription product ID or handle.
The line has a Shopify selling-plan allocation.
The line has an approved _mmg_subscription_plan_code value of monthly, biweekly, or weekly.
subscription_detection.non_subscription_order_behavior: Return not_applicable and render no extension UI.

handoff_states.behavior: Render nothing for orders without the canonical subscription product.
Direct guest buyers to sign in through the Customer Portal with the checkout email before private entitlement data is shown.
Confirm that checkout succeeded while Shopify subscription reconciliation, cycle creation, or first-window creation is still pending.
Direct an authenticated subscriber into Choose Your First Two Titles.
Return the customer to the open first-package window to finish exactly two titles.
Direct the customer to the governed recovery and Customer Service path.
Direct the customer to My Library or membership progress after the first package is confirmed or delivered.

persistence_contract.duplicate_order_behavior: Idempotent upsert; never create a second order-link record.

security_contract: Require a fresh Shopify checkout extension session token on every request.
Verify the session-token signature, audience, destination shop, expiry, not-before time, and token ID in the runtime adapter.
Load the order server-side and verify its order ID, shop domain, and checkout token.
Never trust browser-supplied customer IDs, plan codes, product IDs, entitlement IDs, package counts, or ownership state.
Do not expose provider subscription-contract IDs, entitlement IDs, delivery package references, grant IDs, checkout tokens, or customer IDs.
Guest buyers must authenticate before private entitlement or title-selection state is disclosed.
Return Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * because checkout UI extension origins are not stable, while authorizing the request with the signed session token and verified order context.
The Thank you extension is read-only and cannot mutate the completed order.

storefront_copy_contract.guest_action: Sign in to choose your titles

release_gates: Create or connect the Shopify app project that owns the checkout UI extension.
Assign the extension UID through Shopify CLI rather than inventing a production UID.
Approve network access for the checkout UI extension in the Shopify Partner or Dev Dashboard.
Configure the absolute HTTPS handoff API URL in the checkout and accounts editor.
Route the authenticated endpoint in the production Kairos runtime.
Implement and verify the Shopify Admin API order gateway.
Verify session-token validation against the production Shopify app client ID and secret.
Apply entitlement, delivery-window, and thank-you handoff database migrations.
Connect Shopify subscription webhook reconciliation to mmg_subscription_order_links.
Provision the canonical subscription product and verified runtime IDs.
Test logged-in and guest subscription checkouts, non-subscription orders, delayed order creation, retries, duplicate requests, recovery, and completed first packages.
Add and publish the app block through the checkout and accounts editor only after end-to-end QA passes.

subsequent_components: Live Shopify provisioning and end-to-end deployment
